meta.method: SERP-overlap topic clustering (condensed). SERP source: DuckDuckGo HTML (kl=fr-fr) as google.fr proxy. DataForSEO MCP NOT available — all volume + difficulty are ESTIMATES (est.).

dataQuality.serpSource: DuckDuckGo html/lite endpoint with FR locale; Google blocked by consent wall, Bing unreliable for 'agence' queries (returns real-estate noise).
dataQuality.volumeAndDifficulty: ESTIMATED. No live keyword API. Treat all numbers as directional, not measured.
dataQuality.domainAuthority: Near-zero (DA ~0, absent Common Crawl). Strategy biases to longest-tail / weakest-SERP queries.
dataQuality.geoCaveat: WebSearch is US-only and was unavailable; SERP fidelity to literal google.fr is approximate.

serpIntentVerdict.dominantIntent: COMMERCIAL (commercial-investigation, listicle-dominated). 7/10 are 'top agences' listicles, 2-3 are direct agency service pages, 0 Reddit threads, 0 pure-informational.
serpIntentVerdict.implication: Homepage-as-pillar targeting the commercial head term is the CORRECT play. Do NOT build a separate /agence-reddit page. But note: ranking #1-organic for 'agence reddit' competes against listicles on content-farm domains — getting INTO those listicles (digital PR / outreach) matters as much as the homepage itself.
serpIntentVerdict.serpStrength: WEAK / winnable. Top results sit on low-authority recycled-content domains (lebigdata.fr, cyber-securite.fr, objetconnecte.com, realite-virtuelle.com, le-blog-techno.fr, publithings.com). Real dedicated competitors are few.
serpIntentVerdict.geoFusion: Nearly every ranking page fuses 'agence reddit' with GEO/LLM/SEO. The market has already merged Reddit-marketing and GEO — validates UpvotePartners' dual positioning and the /agence-geo internal link strategy.

competitorsFound.name: Redd Influence
competitorsFound.notes: Self-styled '#1 en France'. ~1500€/mo. NO blog — content lane open. Services: SEO/GEO, community mgmt high-karma accounts, Reddit Ads, reporting, e-reputation/veille.

pillar.title: Agence Reddit & GEO — UpvotePartners (homepage)
pillar.volume: ≈50/mo (est., FR) for 'agence reddit'; +'agence reddit ads' ≈30/mo (est.) — same SERP, same target
pillar.role: HUB. Existing commercial page. Every spoke links UP to it. Do NOT duplicate as /agence-reddit.

clusters.name: Cluster A — Reddit organique : promouvoir sans se faire bannir
clusters.intent: Informational → Commercial bridge (highest strategic fit; founders/marketers = ICP)
clusters.rationale: French SERPs here are THIN: dominated by auto-translated content farms + raw Reddit threads. Easiest cluster to win. Anchors strongly to the agency value prop ('on le fait pour vous, sans risque de ban').

posts.title: Comment faire de l'autopromotion sur Reddit sans se faire bannir (guide 2026)
posts.keyword: autopromotion reddit sans se faire bannir
secondary: promouvoir son contenu sur reddit sans ban

posts.title: Comment promouvoir son site (ou son produit) sur Reddit en 2026
posts.keyword: comment promouvoir son site sur reddit

posts.title: Karma Reddit : à quoi ça sert et comment en gagner (sans tricher)
posts.keyword: comment gagner du karma sur reddit

clusters.name: Cluster B — Reddit Ads (publicité payante)
clusters.intent: Informational → Commercial (BOF). Bridges to the homepage 'Reddit Ads' service.
clusters.rationale: French-native guides exist (synerweb, datashake, communicant, webconversion) but many top results are English/translated. Beatable with a deep, current, FR-native, example-rich set. 'Prix' and 'exemples' queries are BOF and convert.

posts.title: Reddit Ads : combien ça coûte vraiment ? CPC, CPM et budget (2026)
Reddit Ads : tutoriel pas-à-pas pour lancer votre première campagne
5 exemples de campagnes Reddit Ads qui ont cartonné (et pourquoi)

clusters.name: Cluster C — Subreddits & community building
clusters.intent: Informational (TOF/MOF). Feeds organic + ads clusters; very weak SERPs.
clusters.rationale: The 'trouver les bons subreddits' and 'créer un subreddit' SERPs are the WEAKEST encountered — almost entirely auto-translated junk + raw Reddit wikis. Easiest pure-organic wins, though commercial value is indirect.

posts.title: Comment trouver les bons subreddits pour votre marque (méthode + outils)
Créer et animer un subreddit de marque : guide complet

clusters.name: Cluster D — Reddit pour le B2B / SaaS / startups
clusters.intent: Commercial (consideration). Directly targets the agency's ICP (fondateurs SaaS, marketing B2B).
clusters.rationale: Highest BUYER intent. French SERPs for SaaS-acquisition queries are thin (mostly EN + raw Reddit threads), while B2B queries have a live, active French conversation (xavierdegraux, pulpmeup, chezmarko, comdigitale). These posts attract exactly who hires UpvotePartners.

posts.title: Reddit pour le B2B : faut-il s'y lancer en 2026 ? (guide stratégique)

clusters.name: Cluster E — Réputation, veille & Reddit pour le SEO/GEO
clusters.intent: Informational → bridges to /agence-geo. Lower priority (tool-vendor competition) but high topical-authority value.
clusters.rationale: Ties Reddit to brand monitoring AND to SEO/GEO (Reddit content now surfaces in Google + AI answers). Veille SERP is dominated by big SaaS tools (agorapulse, awario, meltwater) so it's harder; the Reddit-SEO/GEO angle is the differentiated, winnable sub-topic and the natural cross-link to /agence-geo.

cannibalizationCheck.notes: No two spokes share a primary keyword. Watch zones: (1) 'comment promouvoir son site sur reddit' (Cluster A) and 'marketing reddit' (informational head) share SERP — keep the head term as a pillar-supporting section on homepage or a single hub article, NOT a second spoke. (2) 'agence reddit ads' overlaps ~6-7/10 with 'agence reddit' — keep BOTH on the homepage (same target), never a separate page. (3) Cluster B 'tuto' vs 'prix' vs 'exemples' kept as distinct primaries to avoid intra-cluster overlap.
